title: Secure pilot partner/steward + independent not-advice audit + expert sign-off of shipped content
context: Benefits-Navigator is an openly-licensed corpus of plain-language, primary-source-cited, multilingual, accessible guides to public-assistance programs (SNAP, Medicaid/CHIP, WIC, TANF, LIHEAP, SSI, housing, EITC, Lifeline/ACP), delivered as a static site, printable PDFs, and structured data with an optional retrieval-grounded explainer. It is a HIGH risk-tier project: it provides information, not legal/benefits advice, never makes an individualized eligibility determination, and always routes people to the official application and free human help. No partner, credentialed reviewer, or requestor is yet secured. This task secures a real pilot partner/steward, commissions an independent not-advice + route-to-human audit, and records expert sign-off of all shipped content. It is driven by the dated partner-acquisition plan; if no partner is secured by ~2027-03-31, the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule applies rather than publishing to no real beneficiary.
objective: Secure a pilot partner/steward, obtain an independent not-advice audit, and record expert sign-off of all shipped content, flipping verifiedNeed to true once a partner is confirmed.
acceptanceCriteria: A real partner (legal-aid org / anti-hunger network / library system / 211 / community action agency) is secured; steward assigned; verifiedNeed flips to true
An independent reviewer audits not-advice + route-to-human behavior; all shipped content has recorded expert sign-off (immigration content attorney-signed); translations reviewed; zero-PII confirmed

Driven by the dated partner-acquisition plan (jurisdiction/program by 2026-08-31, reviewer by 2026-10-31, partner by 2026-12-31); if no partner is secured by ~2027-03-31, the build-vs-mothball/pivot rule is applied and recorded in governance
